role: Core data types and type contracts for the ArchSpine mirror system.
responsibility: Specifies canonical schemas and interfaces for configuration, documents, languages, manifests, rules, versioning, and views, providing a stable type foundation for all subsystems and ensuring data consistency and interoperability.

children.role: This directory defines the core data structures and type contracts for the ArchSpine mirror system, including configuration, documents, languages, manifests, rules, and versioning.
Public protocol facade module providing a stable entry point for importing all ArchSpine protocol types.
Type definition module establishing the contract for view artifacts in the ArchSpine view generation system.
